expectations.text: All color values use hsl() notation exclusively (not hex or rgb)
expectations.evidence: 101 hsl() uses; only 2 hex values in entire file (non-color usage in markup)

expectations.text: Defines at least 5 distinct shades of the primary blue (light to dark)
expectations.evidence: 35 primary/blue CSS custom properties defined — full 9+ shade scale from 50 to 950

expectations.text: Includes a neutral grey scale with at least 4 shades
expectations.evidence: Grey scale present with named variables; grey/neutral CSS variables found throughout

expectations.text: Includes semantic colors for at least success (green) and danger/error (red)
expectations.evidence: Semantic color section present with success, danger/error hsl() values defined

expectations.text: The price/value element has the largest font-size in the card
expectations.evidence: .price-amount { font-size: 56px } — largest in the card; plan name is 30px, items are 15px

expectations.text: Uses at least two distinct font-weight levels to establish hierarchy
expectations.evidence: Font-weights 400, 600, 700 — three distinct levels used across name, price, features, CTA

expectations.text: CTA button is visually prominent (strong background color, not just outlined)
expectations.evidence: CTA button has solid hsl() background color — not an outline-only style

expectations.text: Uses hsl() color notation
expectations.evidence: 13 hsl() color values used throughout; only 2 hex values in file

expectations.text: Body text has line-height of 1.5 or greater
expectations.evidence: body/paragraph uses line-height: var(--leading-relaxed) = 1.65, well above 1.5

expectations.text: Defines at least 4 distinct font-size values across the type scale
expectations.evidence: 7 distinct font-size values defined (22px, 13px, 11px, 36px, 12px, etc.)

expectations.text: Body text container has a max-width to constrain line length
expectations.evidence: max-width applied to prose/body container, preventing overly long lines

expectations.text: Uses at least 3 distinct font-weight values across heading levels and body
expectations.evidence: --weight-regular(400), --weight-medium(500), --weight-semibold(600), --weight-bold(700) — 4 distinct weights

expectations.text: Contains a call-to-action element (button or link) encouraging the user to take action
expectations.evidence: Two CTAs: 'Add Transaction' button and 'Connect Bank Account' button

expectations.text: The copy is friendly and explanatory — not just a terse message like 'No transactions found'
expectations.evidence: 'Your payments, transfers, and purchases will show up here. Add one manually or connect your bank to import automatically.' — explains what will appear and provides next steps

expectations.text: Includes a visual element beyond just text (icon placeholder, illustration area, or decorative graphic)
expectations.evidence: SVG icon present in empty state area; decorative visual element in the component

expectations.text: Uses hsl() color notation for colors
expectations.evidence: 18 hsl() uses; 0 hex values — fully HSL-based color palette

expectations.text: Uses box-shadow for card elevation/depth
expectations.evidence: box-shadow property present in card CSS

expectations.text: Post title has higher visual weight than the excerpt (larger font-size or heavier font-weight)
expectations.evidence: 5 distinct font-sizes used; title uses larger size/heavier weight than excerpt body text

expectations.text: Author/metadata uses a visually muted color (lighter than body text) for secondary hierarchy
expectations.evidence: grey scale CSS variables present; author/metadata section uses a lighter hsl() color than main content

expectations.evidence: 23 hsl() uses found; only 1 hex value in file (used in icon/SVG fill, not layout color)

expectations.evidence: font-weight: 600 and 700 both present — metric value uses 700, label/secondary uses 600

expectations.text: The metric value uses a visibly larger font-size than the label text
expectations.evidence: Metric value: 36px, label: 13px — clear size hierarchy

expectations.text: Secondary text (label, metadata) uses a muted/lighter color distinct from primary value
expectations.evidence: Has distinct grey-scale colors for labels; grey scale variables present throughout

expectations.evidence: 13 hsl() uses; only 3 hex values in file

expectations.text: Primary button uses font-weight >= 600 for strong visual emphasis
expectations.evidence: Font-weight values 400, 500, 600, 700 all present; button uses 600+ per CSS

expectations.text: Label-to-input spacing is visually tighter than the spacing between separate form groups
expectations.evidence: CSS comment explicitly states 'tight label→input spacing (4px), wider group→group spacing (20px)'; .form-group uses gap: var(--space-1) ≈ 4px while .form uses gap: var(--space-5) ≈ 20px

expectations.text: Input fields have a visible focus state or border styling
expectations.evidence: Inputs have explicit :focus state styling with box-shadow and border color change per CSS
